subject: Struggle Gloves — a pair of compact boxing gloves with a star motif
description: A pair of small red and white boxing gloves are depicted against a soft warm orange background. The gloves are rounded and compact, decorated with a white star on each glove face. They appear to be presented as a matched pair, side by side or slightly overlapping. The warm background and clean presentation give the image a bold, approachable feel.
